meta.note: أسئلة واقعية من نماذج STEP الرسمية 2024-2026

questions.text: She _____ to school every day.
questions.explanation: مع ضمير المفرد الغائب (she/he/it) في المضارع البسيط نضيف s للفعل.

questions.text: By the time we arrived, they _____ dinner.
questions.explanation: نستخدم Past Perfect مع 'by the time' للدلالة على حدث انتهى قبل حدث آخر في الماضي.

questions.text: If I _____ rich, I would travel the world.
questions.explanation: في الجملة الشرطية من النوع الثاني نستخدم were مع جميع الضمائر لأن الشرط افتراضي.

questions.text: The book _____ on the table belongs to Ahmed.
questions.explanation: نستخدم lying كصفة (present participle) لوصف مكان الكتاب.

questions.text: Neither the students nor the teacher _____ present.
questions.explanation: مع Neither...nor يتبع الفعل أقرب اسم إليه، وهنا 'teacher' (مفرد) فنستخدم was.

questions.text: I have been living here _____ five years.
questions.explanation: نستخدم 'for' مع فترة زمنية (five years) بينما 'since' مع نقطة بداية محددة.

questions.text: The report _____ by the manager before the meeting.
questions.explanation: المبني للمجهول في الماضي يتكون من was/were + past participle.

questions.text: _____ you mind closing the window?
questions.explanation: نستخدم Would you mind للطلب المهذب. يليها verb+ing.

questions.text: She asked me where _____ the day before.
questions.explanation: في الكلام غير المباشر نحول الزمن للوراء: have been → had been مع ترتيب الجملة الخبرية.

questions.text: The more you practice, _____ you become.
questions.explanation: تركيب the more...the more يستخدم مع صيغة التفضيل لإظهار العلاقة التناسبية.

questions.text: I wish I _____ more time to study.
questions.explanation: بعد wish للتعبير عن أمنية لحاضر أو مستقبل نستخدم Past Simple (had).

questions.text: The children _____ in the garden when it started raining.
questions.explanation: Past Continuous (were playing) تُستخدم لحدث كان جارياً لما قاطعه حدث آخر.

questions.text: He is used to _____ early every morning.
questions.explanation: بعد 'used to' بمعنى معتاد على نستخدم الفعل مضافاً إليه ing.

questions.text: Not only _____ late, but he also forgot his report.
questions.explanation: عند بدء الجملة بـ Not only يحدث قلب (inversion): did + subject + verb.

questions.text: Despite _____ tired, she continued working.
questions.explanation: بعد despite/in spite of نستخدم الفعل مع ing (gerund) أو اسم.

questions.text: There _____ a lot of people at the conference yesterday.
questions.explanation: نستخدم were مع there is/are لأن people جمع، والحدث في الماضي.

questions.text: The exam _____ by the time you arrive.
questions.explanation: Future Perfect (will have finished) تُستخدم للحدث الذي سيكتمل قبل نقطة مستقبلية.

questions.text: They suggested _____ the meeting until next week.
questions.explanation: الأفعال suggest, recommend, avoid تتبعها صيغة الـ gerund (verb+ing).

questions.text: Had I known about the problem, I _____ earlier.
questions.explanation: الجملة الشرطية المعكوسة من النوع الثالث: Had + S + V3, S + would have + V3.

questions.text: She is the most talented student _____ has ever studied here.
questions.explanation: نستخدم who للإشارة إلى شخص في الجمل الوصفية (relative clauses).

questions.text: The company's profits have risen _____ 30% this year.
questions.explanation: نستخدم 'by' للتعبير عن مقدار التغيير أو الزيادة (rise by 30%).

questions.text: Scarcely _____ the door when the phone rang.
questions.explanation: عند بدء الجملة بـ Scarcely/Hardly/No sooner يحدث inversion: had + subject + V3.

questions.text: She'd rather _____ home than go to the party.
questions.explanation: بعد would rather نستخدم المصدر بدون to (bare infinitive).

questions.text: The decision was made without _____ the staff.
questions.explanation: بعد حروف الجر (without, of, in, about) نستخدم gerund (verb+ing).

questions.text: It is essential that every student _____ the exam on time.
questions.explanation: بعد It is essential/important/necessary that نستخدم المصدر بدون to (subjunctive mood).

questions.text: The letter _____ before I could read it.
questions.explanation: المبني للمجهول في الماضي البسيط = was/were + past participle.

questions.text: He speaks English as if he _____ a native speaker.
questions.explanation: بعد as if/as though للتعبير عن موقف غير حقيقي نستخدم were مع جميع الضمائر.

questions.text: I _____ my homework when my friend called.
questions.explanation: Past Continuous للإشارة إلى نشاط كان جارياً حين وقع حدث آخر.

questions.text: This is the first time she _____ sushi.
questions.explanation: بعد This is the first time نستخدم Present Perfect (has eaten).

questions.text: _____ the rain, we decided to continue the match.
questions.explanation: Despite يتبعه اسم أو gerund مباشرة بدون of. Although يتبعه جملة كاملة.

questions.text: She must _____ the keys somewhere; they're not here.
questions.explanation: must + have + past participle للاستدلال على حدث وقع في الماضي.

questions.text: The students are looking forward _____ the trip.
questions.explanation: look forward to يتبعه gerund (verb+ing)، فالجواب: to going on.

questions.text: No sooner _____ home than it started raining.
questions.explanation: No sooner ... than تتطلب inversion: had + subject + V3.

questions.text: The old man had difficulty _____ the stairs.
questions.explanation: have difficulty + gerund (verb+ing) هي التركيب الصحيح.

questions.text: I'd prefer _____ by plane rather than by train.
questions.explanation: بعد would prefer نستخدم to + infinitive (to travel).

questions.text: They _____ working on the project for three hours.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous (have been + V-ing) للتعبير عن نشاط بدأ في الماضي ومستمر حتى الآن.

questions.text: _____ he studied harder, he would have passed the exam.
questions.explanation: في الشرطية المعكوسة من النوع الثالث، يمكن استبدال If بـ Had في بداية الجملة.

questions.text: The manager, along with his team, _____ working overtime.
questions.explanation: عندما يكون الفاعل الرئيسي مفرداً ويضاف إليه along with/together with، يبقى الفعل مفرداً.

questions.text: Both Sara and Khalid _____ interested in the new project.
questions.explanation: Both...and يتبعه فعل الجمع (are).

questions.text: She has been working here _____ she graduated.
questions.explanation: نستخدم 'since' مع نقطة بداية محددة (she graduated) في زمن Past.

questions.text: The scientist made a _____ discovery that changed medicine forever.
questions.explanation: groundbreaking = رائد/متميز - يُستخدم لوصف اكتشاف أو إنجاز غير مسبوق.

questions.text: The manager tried to _____ the conflict between the two departments.
questions.explanation: mediate = يتوسط/يحكّم - التوسط في حل النزاعات بين طرفين.

questions.text: Her _____ to complete the project impressed everyone.
questions.explanation: determination = تصميم/عزيمة - القرار الراسخ على إنجاز شيء ما.

questions.text: The new policy is _____ to all employees regardless of their position.
questions.explanation: applicable = قابل للتطبيق/ينطبق على - يُستخدم للشيء الذي يسري على الجميع.

questions.text: We need to _____ the situation carefully before making a decision.
questions.explanation: assess = يقيّم/يدرس - التقييم الدقيق للموقف قبل اتخاذ القرار.

questions.text: The company decided to _____ its operations to new markets.
questions.explanation: expand = يوسّع - التوسع في العمليات أو الأنشطة لتشمل مناطق جديدة.

questions.text: The professor gave a _____ explanation of the complex theory.
questions.explanation: comprehensive = شامل/مستوعب - يغطي جميع الجوانب بشكل كامل.

questions.text: The new law was met with _____ opposition from the public.
questions.explanation: fierce = شديد/عنيف - يُستخدم لوصف معارضة أو مقاومة قوية جداً.

questions.text: The speaker's ideas were _____ and easy to understand.
questions.explanation: concise = موجز/مختصر - التعبير بوضوح بأقل عدد ممكن من الكلمات.

questions.text: She showed great _____ in handling the difficult customer.
questions.explanation: patience = صبر - القدرة على التعامل مع المواقف الصعبة بهدوء.

questions.text: The government implemented new _____ to reduce pollution.
questions.explanation: measures = تدابير/إجراءات - الخطوات المتخذة لمعالجة مشكلة أو تحقيق هدف.

questions.text: His speech was _____, leaving the audience confused.
questions.explanation: incoherent = غير متماسك/مبهم - الكلام الذي لا يمكن فهمه أو تتبع منطقه.

questions.text: The new bridge will _____ the two sides of the city.
questions.explanation: connect = يربط/يوصل - يُستخدم لوصف الوصل بين مكانين أو شيئين.

questions.text: Her constant _____ of others was considered unprofessional.
questions.explanation: criticism = انتقاد - التعليق السلبي على أداء أو تصرفات الآخرين.

questions.text: The company is working to _____ its carbon footprint.
questions.explanation: reduce = يُقلل/يُخفض - هدف مشترك في سياسات البيئة والاستدامة.

questions.text: The researcher published a _____ study on climate change.
questions.explanation: landmark = بارز/محوري - يُستخدم لوصف عمل أو حدث ذو أثر كبير وتاريخي.

questions.text: The project requires _____ from all team members.
questions.explanation: collaboration = تعاون - العمل المشترك لتحقيق هدف مشترك.

questions.text: The CEO made a _____ decision to restructure the company.
questions.explanation: bold = جريء/شجاع - اتخاذ قرارات صعبة دون تردد مع معرفة المخاطر.

questions.text: The new software is _____ with older computer systems.
questions.explanation: compatible = متوافق - يعمل بشكل صحيح مع أنظمة أو برامج أخرى.

questions.text: The politician's speech was full of _____ and had little substance.
questions.explanation: rhetoric = خطابة/كلام فضفاض - الاستخدام المبالغ فيه للألفاظ البليغة دون مضمون حقيقي.

questions.text: Despite the challenges, she remained _____ in her goals.
questions.explanation: focused = مركّز - الثبات على الهدف ومقاومة الانشغال بأمور أخرى.

questions.text: The new regulation will _____ all small businesses.
questions.explanation: affect = يؤثر على - التأثير العام على شيء أو مجموعة دون تحديد النوع.

questions.text: The document requires your _____ to be valid.
questions.explanation: signature = توقيع - الإمضاء الذي يُثبت أن الشخص وافق على الوثيقة.

questions.text: The scientist's _____ led to an unexpected discovery.
questions.explanation: curiosity = فضول - الرغبة في معرفة المزيد، وهي صفة أساسية في العلماء.

questions.text: The workshop aims to _____ participants' communication skills.
questions.explanation: enhance = يُعزز/يُحسّن - تطوير مهارة أو قدرة لتصبح أفضل.

questions.text: He showed remarkable _____ in recovering from the injury.
questions.explanation: resilience = مرونة/صمود - القدرة على التعافي سريعاً من الصعوبات.

questions.text: The ancient ruins were well _____ despite their age.
questions.explanation: preserved = محفوظ/محافظ عليه - الإبقاء على شيء قديم في حالة جيدة.

questions.text: The committee voted _____ to approve the new budget.
questions.explanation: unanimously = بالإجماع - موافقة جميع الأعضاء دون استثناء.

questions.text: She felt _____ after finishing the challenging project.
questions.explanation: exhausted = منهك/مرهق - الشعور بالإرهاق الشديد بعد جهد كبير.

questions.text: The teacher used several _____ to explain the concept.
questions.explanation: analogies = مقارنات/تشبيهات - استخدام أمثلة مشابهة لتوضيح فكرة صعبة.

questions.text: The company's new strategy proved highly _____.
questions.explanation: effective = فعّال - يحقق النتائج المرجوة بنجاح.

questions.text: He was _____ by the audience's positive response.
questions.explanation: overwhelmed = مرتاح جداً/مرتبك - الشعور بضغط عاطفي قوي بسبب موقف إيجابي أو سلبي.

questions.text: The scientist's _____ findings contradicted previous research.
questions.explanation: controversial = مثير للجدل - النتائج التي تثير خلافاً وآراء متعارضة.

questions.text: The new law was designed to _____ corruption in public offices.
questions.explanation: combat = يكافح/يحارب - مكافحة ظاهرة سلبية أو مشكلة.

questions.text: His work is characterized by great attention to _____.
questions.explanation: attention to detail = الاهتمام بالتفاصيل - من أهم صفات العمل الدقيق والمتقن.

questions.text: The new hospital will _____ the medical needs of the region.
questions.explanation: address = يعالج/يتناول - التعامل مع مشكلة أو احتياج بجدية.

questions.text: The teacher's _____ approach made learning fun for everyone.
questions.explanation: innovative = مبتكر - استخدام أساليب جديدة وإبداعية في التدريس.

questions.text: The report revealed a _____ gap between rich and poor.
questions.explanation: widening = يتسع - gap يتسع يعني الفجوة تزداد اتساعاً.

questions.text: She was known for her _____ in solving complex problems.
questions.explanation: ingenuity = براعة/ذكاء خلاق - القدرة على إيجاد حلول إبداعية للمشكلات.

questions.text: The politician made a _____ promise to improve education.
questions.explanation: specific = محدد/واضح - الوعود المحددة والقابلة للقياس أفضل من الوعود العامة.

passages.title: Digital Transformation in Education
passages.text: The integration of technology into education has fundamentally transformed how students learn and teachers instruct. Digital tools such as interactive whiteboards, online learning platforms, and educational apps have created more engaging and personalized learning experiences. Research indicates that students who use technology in their studies demonstrate higher levels of motivation and achieve better academic outcomes. However, critics argue that excessive screen time can have negative effects on concentration and social development. The key lies in striking a balance between digital and traditional teaching methods, ensuring that technology serves as a tool for enhancement rather than a replacement for human interaction. Educational institutions worldwide are now developing frameworks to integrate technology thoughtfully, focusing on critical thinking and problem-solving skills that will prepare students for an increasingly digital workforce.

questions.text: What is the main idea of this passage?
options: The negative effects of technology in schools
The balanced integration of technology in education
questions.explanation: الفكرة الرئيسية هي التكامل المتوازن بين التكنولوجيا والتعليم، وليس الاستبدال التام.

questions.text: According to the passage, what do critics argue about technology?
questions.explanation: يقول المنتقدون أن وقت الشاشة الزائد يؤثر سلباً على التركيز والتطور الاجتماعي.

questions.text: The word 'integration' in the first sentence most likely means:
questions.explanation: integration = دمج/تكامل - combining different elements together.

questions.text: What does the passage suggest about the future of education?
options: Institutions are developing frameworks for thoughtful tech use
Students should only use traditional methods
questions.explanation: النص يشير إلى أن المؤسسات تطور أطراً لدمج التكنولوجيا بشكل متأمل.

questions.text: The phrase 'striking a balance' means:
questions.explanation: striking a balance = إيجاد توازن مناسب بين أمرين.

passages.title: The Impact of Remote Work
passages.text: The rise of remote work, accelerated by the global pandemic, has permanently altered the landscape of professional employment. Companies that once required daily office attendance are now offering flexible work arrangements as a competitive advantage in attracting talent. Studies show that remote workers often report higher job satisfaction and better work-life balance, though they also face challenges such as isolation, difficulty separating work from personal life, and reduced collaboration opportunities. Organizations must invest in digital communication tools and management strategies to maintain productivity and team cohesion. The future workplace is likely to embrace a hybrid model, combining the benefits of in-person collaboration with the flexibility of remote work. This shift requires both employers and employees to adapt their skills and mindsets to thrive in an evolving professional environment.

questions.text: What accelerated the rise of remote work?
questions.explanation: الجائحة العالمية كانت العامل الرئيسي في تسريع انتشار العمل عن بُعد.

questions.text: According to the passage, what challenge do remote workers face?
options: Isolation and difficulty separating work from personal life
questions.explanation: التحديات الرئيسية: العزلة وصعوبة الفصل بين العمل والحياة الشخصية.

questions.text: The word 'cohesion' in the passage most closely means:
questions.explanation: cohesion = تماسك/وحدة - ارتباط أجزاء الفريق ببعضها بشكل متناسق.

questions.text: What does the author predict for the future workplace?
questions.explanation: يتوقع الكاتب نموذجاً هجيناً يجمع بين مزايا الحضور الشخصي ومرونة العمل عن بُعد.

questions.text: What must organizations invest in according to the passage?
options: Digital communication tools and management strategies
questions.explanation: يجب على المنظمات الاستثمار في أدوات التواصل الرقمي واستراتيجيات الإدارة.

passages.title: Renewable Energy and Sustainability
passages.text: As the world grapples with the consequences of climate change, renewable energy sources have emerged as critical alternatives to fossil fuels. Solar panels, wind turbines, and hydroelectric power plants are now generating significant portions of electricity in many countries. The cost of solar energy has dropped dramatically over the past decade, making it competitive with traditional energy sources. However, transitioning to renewable energy requires substantial infrastructure investment and policy support. Critics point out that renewable sources are intermittent – the sun does not always shine and the wind does not always blow – requiring advances in energy storage technology. Despite these challenges, most experts agree that expanding renewable energy capacity is essential for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and achieving carbon neutrality by 2050.

questions.text: What is the primary focus of this passage?
questions.explanation: الموضوع الرئيسي هو التحول نحو الطاقة المتجددة وتحدياتها وأهميتها.

questions.text: What has happened to the cost of solar energy?
questions.explanation: تكلفة الطاقة الشمسية انخفضت بشكل كبير خلال العقد الماضي.

questions.text: The word 'intermittent' as used in the passage means:
options: not continuous, occurring at irregular intervals
questions.explanation: intermittent = متقطع/غير منتظم - لا يعمل بشكل مستمر أو منتظم.

questions.text: According to the passage, what challenge remains for renewable energy?
options: Intermittency and need for energy storage
questions.explanation: التحدي الرئيسي هو التقطع وضرورة تطوير تكنولوجيا تخزين الطاقة.

questions.text: What do most experts agree is necessary by 2050?
options: Expanding renewable energy and achieving carbon neutrality
questions.explanation: يتفق معظم الخبراء على ضرورة توسيع الطاقة المتجددة لتحقيق حياد كربوني بحلول 2050.

passages.title: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare
passages.text: Artificial intelligence is revolutionizing healthcare by enabling faster and more accurate diagnoses, predicting disease outbreaks, and personalizing treatment plans. Machine learning algorithms can analyze vast amounts of medical data to identify patterns that human doctors might miss. AI-powered diagnostic tools have shown remarkable success in detecting cancers, eye diseases, and cardiovascular conditions at early stages. Despite these promising developments, ethical concerns remain about patient privacy, algorithmic bias, and the potential for reducing the human element in medical care. Healthcare professionals argue that AI should augment rather than replace human judgment, serving as a powerful tool in the physician's arsenal while maintaining the essential doctor-patient relationship. Regulatory frameworks are being developed worldwide to govern the responsible use of AI in medical settings.

questions.text: According to the passage, what is AI's main advantage in healthcare?
options: Enabling faster and more accurate diagnoses
questions.explanation: الميزة الرئيسية للذكاء الاصطناعي هي تمكين التشخيصات الأسرع والأدق.

questions.text: What ethical concerns are mentioned in the passage?
options: Patient privacy, algorithmic bias, and reducing human element
questions.explanation: المخاوف الأخلاقية: خصوصية المريض، التحيز الخوارزمي، وتقليص الجانب الإنساني.

questions.text: The word 'augment' in the passage means:
questions.explanation: augment = يُعزز/يضيف - تحسين شيء بإضافة شيء آخر إليه.

questions.text: What are regulations being developed for?
options: Governing responsible use of AI in medicine
questions.explanation: تُطوَّر الأطر التنظيمية لحوكمة الاستخدام المسؤول للذكاء الاصطناعي في المجال الطبي.

questions.text: Healthcare professionals believe AI should:
options: Work alongside doctors as a tool
questions.explanation: يرى المهنيون الصحيون أن الذكاء الاصطناعي يجب أن يعمل جانباً للأطباء كأداة مساعدة.

passages.title: Urbanization and Its Challenges
passages.text: The world is becoming increasingly urban, with more than half of the global population now living in cities. This rapid urbanization brings both opportunities and challenges. Cities are centers of economic activity, innovation, and cultural exchange, offering residents access to education, healthcare, and employment opportunities that may not be available in rural areas. However, rapid urbanization also leads to overcrowding, inadequate infrastructure, environmental degradation, and social inequality. Developing nations face particular challenges in managing their fast-growing urban populations with limited resources. Sustainable urban planning focuses on creating livable cities that meet the needs of present residents without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their needs. Smart city technologies, including data analytics and IoT systems, offer promising solutions to manage urban resources more efficiently.

questions.text: What percentage of the global population lives in cities?
questions.explanation: النص يذكر أن أكثر من نصف سكان العالم يعيشون في المدن.

questions.text: What advantages do cities offer according to the passage?
options: Access to education, healthcare, and employment
questions.explanation: توفر المدن الوصول إلى التعليم والرعاية الصحية وفرص العمل.

questions.text: The word 'degradation' in the passage most closely means:
questions.explanation: degradation = تدهور/تراجع - انخفاض في الجودة أو المستوى.

questions.text: What do developing nations particularly struggle with?
options: Managing fast-growing urban populations with limited resources
questions.explanation: تواجه الدول النامية تحدياً في إدارة تزايد سكانها الحضري بموارد محدودة.

questions.text: What does sustainable urban planning aim to achieve?
options: Meeting current needs without compromising future generations
questions.explanation: التخطيط الحضري المستدام يهدف لتلبية احتياجات الحاضر دون المساس بقدرة الأجيال القادمة.

questions.text: In a conversation, Sarah says: 'I've been under the weather lately.' What does this expression mean?
options: She works outdoors in bad weather
questions.explanation: under the weather = غير مرتاح صحياً/مريض - تعبير اصطلاحي شائع.

questions.text: A professor says: 'This point is crucial to understanding the rest of the lecture.' The word 'crucial' means:
questions.explanation: crucial = بالغ الأهمية/حاسم - ضروري جداً لفهم شيء ما.

questions.text: An announcer states: 'The conference has been postponed indefinitely.' What does 'indefinitely' mean?
questions.explanation: indefinitely = لأجل غير مسمى - بدون تحديد موعد محدد في المستقبل.

questions.text: A student asks: 'Could you elaborate on that point?' What is the student requesting?
questions.explanation: elaborate = يشرح بالتفصيل - الطالب يطلب مزيداً من التوضيح والتفاصيل.

questions.text: A manager tells an employee: 'I need this report by end of business today, no exceptions.' The tone suggests:
questions.explanation: no exceptions يدل على موعد نهائي صارم لا تنازل عنه.

questions.text: A speaker says: 'On the contrary, the results were quite favorable.' This phrase indicates:
questions.explanation: on the contrary = على العكس من ذلك - يُستخدم للتناقض مع ما سبق ذكره.

questions.text: An instructor announces: 'I'll be taking attendance, so make sure you're here promptly.' What does 'promptly' mean?
questions.explanation: promptly = في الوقت المحدد/بسرعة - الحضور في الموعد تماماً.

questions.text: A professor remarks: 'The data seems to contradict the initial hypothesis.' This means the data:
options: Shows no relation to the hypothesis
questions.explanation: contradict = يتناقض مع - البيانات تختلف مع الفرضية الأولية.

questions.text: During a presentation, someone says: 'In essence, the core message is about sustainability.' 'In essence' means:
questions.explanation: in essence = في الأساس/بشكل جوهري - للتعبير عن الفكرة الرئيسية.

questions.text: A supervisor tells a team: 'Let's not beat around the bush – we need to address the budget cuts immediately.' This idiom means:
options: They need to work around the bush
They should not avoid the main point
They need to trim expenses carefully
They should discuss the issue slowly
questions.explanation: beat around the bush = يتهرب من الموضوع - المدير يطلب التحدث بشكل مباشر.

questions.text: A student hears: 'The assignment is due at the stroke of midnight.' When is it due?
questions.explanation: at the stroke of midnight = عند منتصف الليل تماماً، أي الساعة 12:00 صباحاً.

questions.text: A guest lecturer says: 'To put it in a nutshell, the economy is recovering slowly.' This phrase means:
questions.explanation: in a nutshell = باختصار - تلخيص الفكرة الرئيسية بإيجاز.

questions.text: An employee hears: 'Your proposal has considerable merit.' What does this mean?
options: Your proposal has many good points
questions.explanation: considerable merit = مزايا/فضائل كبيرة - الاقتراح له نقاط قوة واضحة.

questions.text: A professor states: 'This phenomenon is not unique to our country; it's prevalent globally.' 'Prevalent' means:
questions.explanation: prevalent = شائع/منتشر على نطاق واسع.

questions.text: During a debate, a speaker says: 'That argument is a red herring.' What does this idiom mean?
questions.explanation: red herring = حجة مضللة/انحراف - حجة تُستخدم لصرف الانتباه عن الموضوع الرئيسي.

questions.text: A news reporter says: 'The CEO will step down effective immediately.' What will the CEO do?
questions.explanation: step down = يستقيل/يتنحى - ترك المنصب الحالي.

questions.text: A teacher says: 'The test will be a piece of cake for those who studied.' This idiom means:
options: The test will be very easy
questions.explanation: a piece of cake = سهل جداً - شيء لا يتطلب جهداً كبيراً.

questions.text: In a lecture, a professor says: 'This approach is tantamount to ignoring the problem.' 'Tantamount' means:
questions.explanation: tantamount = معادل/مساوٍ - يُستخدم للإشارة إلى أن شيئاً ما يعادل شيئاً آخر في تأثيره.

questions.text: A student overhears: 'The professor is a tough nut to crack.' This means the professor is:
options: Difficult to understand or deal with
questions.explanation: tough nut to crack = صعب المراس/يصعب التعامل معه - شخص صعب الفهم أو التعامل.

questions.text: An academic advisor says: 'Your GPA is on the borderline; you need to step up your game.' What should the student do?
questions.explanation: step up your game = تحسين الأداء - المستشار ينصح الطالب بالعمل بجدية أكبر.

questions.text: A professor announces: 'The exam will cover chapters 5 through 8 inclusive.' What chapters are included?
questions.explanation: inclusive = شامل الطرفين - الفصول 5 و6 و7 و8 جميعها مشمولة في الاختبار.

questions.text: A speaker says: 'We should take this claim with a grain of salt.' This means:
options: We should test it in a laboratory
We should not accept it without question
questions.explanation: take with a grain of salt = لا تصدق كل ما يُقال دون تحقق - كن متشككاً قليلاً.

questions.text: During a presentation: 'The new policy will have far-reaching consequences.' 'Far-reaching' means:
questions.explanation: far-reaching = بعيد المدى/واسع النطاق - يؤثر على نطاق واسع.

questions.text: A colleague says: 'I'll have to burn the midnight oil to finish this project.' This means:
options: They will work very late at night
They need to buy more office supplies
questions.explanation: burn the midnight oil = يسهر حتى وقت متأخر للعمل - الاجتهاد في الليل.

questions.text: A professor says: 'This essay is plagiarized and will have grave consequences.' 'Grave' here means:
questions.explanation: grave = خطير/جسيم - يُستخدم لوصف عواقب أو مواقف ذات خطورة شديدة.

questions.text: The committee's decision to _____ the project was met with widespread criticism.
questions.explanation: terminate = ينهي/يلغي - إنهاء المشروع قبل اكتماله سيواجه انتقادات.

questions.text: The research findings were _____ with the initial hypothesis.
questions.explanation: consistent with = يتفق مع - النتائج البحثية تتماشى مع الفرضية الأولية.

questions.text: The article argues that social media has a _____ effect on political discourse.
questions.explanation: polarizing = مُسبب للاستقطاب - وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي تُعمق الخلافات السياسية.

questions.text: The author's tone in the final paragraph can best be described as:
questions.explanation: تحليل النبرة (tone analysis) يتطلب فهم الكلمات والأسلوب المستخدم في الخاتمة.

questions.text: The word 'mitigate' most closely means:
questions.explanation: mitigate = يُخفف/يُقلل من حدة - التقليل من شدة شيء سلبي.

questions.text: The passage implies that economic growth alone _____ guarantee social equality.
questions.explanation: cannot = لا يستطيع - النمو الاقتصادي وحده لا يكفل المساواة الاجتماعية.

questions.text: Which of the following best describes the purpose of the introduction in an academic essay?
options: To state the main argument and preview the structure
questions.explanation: مقدمة المقالة الأكاديمية تُقدم الحجة الرئيسية وتُمهد لهيكل المقالة.

questions.text: The term 'empirical evidence' refers to:
options: evidence based on observation and experimentation
questions.explanation: empirical evidence = دليل تجريبي - يستند إلى الملاحظة والتجربة العلمية.

questions.text: In academic writing, a 'thesis statement' serves to:
options: State the main argument of the paper
questions.explanation: thesis statement = صياغة الحجة الرئيسية للورقة البحثية بوضوح.

questions.text: The study revealed a _____ correlation between exercise and mental health.
questions.explanation: positive correlation = ارتباط إيجابي - كلما زاد التمرين، تحسنت الصحة النفسية.

questions.text: The author uses the rhetorical device of _____ to emphasize the severity of the situation.
questions.explanation: hyperbole = مبالغة - استخدام تعبيرات مبالغ فيها للتأكيد على شدة الموقف.

questions.text: Which sentence demonstrates correct parallel structure?
options: She likes swimming, to run, and cycling
She likes swimming, running, and cycling
She likes to swim, running, and cycles
She likes swim, to run, and to cycle
questions.explanation: التوازي البنيوي (parallel structure) يتطلب استخدام نفس الصيغة النحوية: swimming, running, cycling (جميعها gerund).

questions.text: The phrase 'in lieu of' means:
questions.explanation: in lieu of = بدلاً من - تعبير رسمي يُستخدم في الكتابة الأكاديمية والمهنية.

questions.text: A text that presents both sides of an argument without taking a position is called:
questions.explanation: النص الذي يعرض جانبين دون اتخاذ موقف يُسمى نصاً تحليلياً متوازناً.

questions.text: The phrase 'the status quo' refers to:
questions.explanation: the status quo = الوضع الراهن/الحالي - الحالة الحالية للأمور كما هي.
